claim: Users notice speech response latency >500ms and hang up >1 second; in optimized pipelines, 75ms network latency from distant data centers adds 30% overhead
actionable: Colocate voice agent models in the same data center as your orchestrator; reduce network latency from 75ms to 5ms for 30% total latency improvement
source_title: Engineering voice agents: Latency, quality, and scale — Rishabh Bhargava, Together AI

claim: Speech-to-text: target P90 <100ms transcription latency + ~6% word error rate for production voice agents; turn detection remains largely unsolved
actionable: Benchmark STT models on P90 latency and WER; build guard rails around turn detection (pause duration, confidence thresholds) to prevent agent interruptions
source_title: Engineering voice agents: Latency, quality, and scale — Rishabh Bhargava, Together AI

claim: LLM dominates voice agent latency budget: target 200-300ms TTFT; 8-30B models offer optimal balance of latency and tool-calling capability; larger models blow the budget
actionable: Size your voice agent LLM to 8-30B parameters; measure TTFT on your hardware and co-locate to achieve 200-300ms target
source_title: Engineering voice agents: Latency, quality, and scale — Rishabh Bhargava, Together AI

claim: Thinker-talker pattern: small LLM handles conversation flow and issues one tool call to a larger model for complex requests, avoiding multi-turn latency in voice agents
actionable: Route voice agent requests: small LLM (3-7B) for intent/turn management, delegate complex tasks to large model via single tool call to preserve low-latency path
source_title: Engineering voice agents: Latency, quality, and scale — Rishabh Bhargava, Together AI

claim: Pure speech-to-speech models promise low latency and emotion preservation but struggle with instruction following and tool calling; still pipeline-based in production
actionable: Avoid single-model speech-to-speech for mission-critical voice agents; stick with pipeline (STT → LLM → TTS) for tool-calling reliability until models improve
source_title: Engineering voice agents: Latency, quality, and scale — Rishabh Bhargava, Together AI
